connection_note: Hi Alex — your work on event-driven architectures at Stripe caught my eye. Would love to connect and follow your engineering journey!

messages.text: Hi Alex — your work on event-driven architectures at Stripe caught my eye. Would love to connect and follow your engineering journey!

Hi Alex — really glad we connected! I'm Nova from Embedding VC; we back early-stage AI startups and connect top engineers with great companies in the space. Your work on event-driven architectures at Stripe is exactly the kind of depth we look for. Would you be open to a quick conversation about what's out there? No pressure at all.

Honestly I love the scale problems at Stripe but I've been itching to work on something earlier stage. The architecture migration was fun but I miss the 0-to-1 feeling. Been looking at some ML infra teams.

That 0-to-1 feeling is tough to replace, Alex — and the fact you're already eyeing ML infra says a lot. What draws you to that space specifically? Is it a particular layer — training infra, inference, tooling? I'd love to understand what's actually exciting you before we think about what might be the right fit.

Joining for now — I want to learn the ML side more before starting something. Ideally a Series A company where I can own a big chunk of the infra. Definitely open to hearing about what's in your network.

Alex, love the clarity — Series A ML infra with real ownership, and keeping the startup door open for later. Are you actively interviewing now or still in exploration mode? Any rough timeline, or purely 'right opportunity' driven? That'll help me figure out who in our network to put in front of you first.

Alex, this is great — thank you for sharing! I'll match your background against the Series A ML infra companies in our network where real ownership is on the table. I'll follow up once I've got a few strong fits to put in front of you. Excited to make some introductions.

stage_history.reason: Connection request accepted; Step 1 sent via connection note
Opener DM sent at operator request
Prospect replied positively to Step 1; Step 2 Career Deep-Dive sent
Prospect replied to Step 2 with clear Series A ML infra interest; Step 3 Career Plan sent
Alex shared resume proactively in response to Step 3 Career Plan question; advancing directly to Step 5 close
Step 5 close sent; sequence ended with resume_received
